arts.ttl: Inter Miami 'very interested in signing Kevin De Bruyne on a free transfer' after Man City star announced he will leave club at the end of the season
arts.sum: Inter Miami are reportedly 'very interested' in the possibility of signing Manchester City midfielder Kevin De Bruyne in the summer.

arts.ttl: David Beckham picks up on wife Victoria's reaction as he says 'how dare they?'
arts.sum: David Beckham was in attendance to watch his Inter Miami side take on Los Angeles FC in the CONCACAF Champions Cup, and the former England captain was in a state of panic throughout

arts.ttl: Inter Miami Predicted Lineup vs Chicago Fire
arts.sum: Will Inter Miami be able to play with energy after a draining victory over LAFC in Concacaf Champions Cup?

arts.ttl: Sunday's Major League Soccer predictions including Chicago Fire vs. Inter Miami
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Major League Soccer fixtures, including Chicago Fire vs. Inter Miami.

arts.ttl: Inter Miami vs. Chicago Fire FC: Preview, Predictions, Team News
arts.sum: Will Javier Mascherano rest players after a Concacaf Champions Cup win over LAFC?

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi eyes Inter Miami extension as he refuses to leave before christening their new stadium
arts.sum: By July 2023, six months after lifting the World Cup with Argetina, the Argentine icon was itching for a new challenge, and Inter Miami swooped in with a contract that runs through 2025. After an unparalleled career at Barcelona -where he shattered records with 672 goals, won 10 La Liga crowns, and lifted four Champions League titles-his two-year stint at Paris Saint-Germain felt like a shadow of his prime.

arts.ttl: Whitecaps hike Champions Cup prices tenfold for Messi and Inter Miami’s visit to Vancouver
arts.sum: This weekend in the MLS, Vancouver Whitecaps will play against Austin FC at BC Place and tickets for Miami’s visit are roughly more than ten times the price for this weekend’s regular season contest. Inter Miami and Vancouver Whitecaps will meet in the 2025 Concacaf Champions Cup semifinals with the winner facing the victorious side from the Cruz Azul-Tigres clash.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi to pen bumper new Inter Miami deal to take MLS side into new stadium
arts.sum: Argentina international Lionel Messi is out of contract at current club Inter Miami at the end of 2025 but there has been some fresh positivity around an extension

arts.ttl: 'I've played with Cristiano Ronaldo and vs Lionel Messi – but Liverpool icon is my GOAT'
arts.sum: The debate around the greatest player of all time has been centred on Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi in recent times, but one France star has a different pick for his favourite player
